name: KONG AirDog Fetch Stick W/Rope Lg
description: The KONGAir Fetch Stick with Rope is an interesting new take on a classic dog play toy - the humble tennis ball! Made from a nonabrasive tennis ball material which is gentle on teeth and gums, its shape is great for chewing and catching. The high-quality throw rope is designed to be durable and makes the KONGAir Fetch Stick a joy to throw. In addition, it floats high in the water so you can take your games of fetch out onto the water!
